title: Domain Errors, State, and Resource Lifecycles · Guided Program Studio
summary: Keep loan state transitions, storage sessions, and notification failures recoverable and observable. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a stateful failure-resilient service while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model allowed states and transitions explicitly so every method preserves domain invariants.
Define a small domain error hierarchy that communicates recoverable business failures without leaking infrastructure details.
Translate storage, network, and parsing failures at ownership boundaries while preserving causes for operators.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
